result: {"schema_version": 1, "pass": false, "review_status": "completed", "summary": "參數化查詢被改為字串拼接，引入 SQL injection 漏洞", "issues": [{"severity": "critical", "confidence": "high", "category": "security", "file": "db.py", "line_hint": "L14-L15", "check": "原本使用 `?` 佔位符的參數化查詢被改為直接將 `name` 拼接進 SQL 字串", "verdict": "這是教科書級 SQL injection 漏洞。攻擊者傳入 `' OR '1'='1` 即可繞過條件取得全部資料；傳入 `'; DROP TABLE users; --` 可刪除資料表", "fix": "還原為參數化查詢：`self.db.execute(\"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = ?\", (name,))`"}]}
